title: Dogz Royale
summary: Burgers In General will be serving food this weekend Friday from 5 till 11 and Saturday all day! 🍔🍟
body_text: Join us from 9pm this Saturday where the rock 'n' roll 3 piece band 'DOGZ ROYALE' returns to our venue playing your all time favourites.
priceLabel: Free entry, Burgers In General prices from
locations: Rose and Crown | Burgers in General

title: Quiz Night
summary: Join us for our second Sunday Quiz Night in April
body_text: This week’s quiz is hosted by multi-talented quizmaster, Matt.

title: Backgammon and Games Night
body_text: Come and play friendly matches, learn the game with teaching if you need. Join us for other games too such as Chess, Draughts and Uno.
imageAlt: A group of people sat in a pub playing backgammon
